revision.comment: Bot: Creating normal ill redirect for [[Category:Lua-based templates]].
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template talk:Col-float]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:pages created from Interlanguage links]] [[ja:qq]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Automatic wikipedia redirects
Bot: remove deleted category Pages created from Interlanguage links
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (no qid-linked ja/en/simple source); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 12:54, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Initial import == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 12:54, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- No source talk page found via linked QID sitelinks (ja/en/simple) at migration time. -->

Was distracted seeing a red link for this page, so...
[[User:Sardanaphalus|Sardanaphalus]] ([[User talk:Sardanaphalus|talk]]) 18:40, 28 June 2014 (UTC)
== firstcol, nextcol, width parameters ==
As near as I can tell The ''firstcol'', ''nextcol'', ''width'' parameter(s) don't work. They should be explained a lot better, including examples. [[User:User-duck|User-duck]] ([[User talk:User-duck|talk]]) 14:15, 20 August 2021 (UTC)
== Issues with spacing around the template ==
For some reason, when this template is placed next to images along the side of the page, the columns do not start until the top of the last picture. This means a gap can form when there are lots of images; for examples, see the multiple wins and nominations sections at [[95th Academy Awards]] and [[74th Primetime Emmy Awards]]. Is there a reason for this issue? [[User:RunningTiger123|RunningTiger123]] ([[User talk:RunningTiger123|talk]]) 02:22, 7 August 2023 (UTC)
== width? ==
Is "width" supposed to be crossed out? What does that mean? [[Special:Contributions/~2025-37491-60|~2025-37491-60]] ([[User talk:~2025-37491-60|talk]]) 15:13, 3 December 2025 (UTC)

Was distracted seeing a red link for this page, so...
[[User:Sardanaphalus|Sardanaphalus]] ([[User talk:Sardanaphalus|talk]]) 18:40, 28 June 2014 (UTC)
== firstcol, nextcol, width parameters ==
As near as I can tell The ''firstcol'', ''nextcol'', ''width'' parameter(s) don't work. They should be explained a lot better, including examples. [[User:User-duck|User-duck]] ([[User talk:User-duck|talk]]) 14:15, 20 August 2021 (UTC)
== Issues with spacing around the template ==
For some reason, when this template is placed next to images along the side of the page, the columns do not start until the top of the last picture. This means a gap can form when there are lots of images; for examples, see the multiple wins and nominations sections at [[95th Academy Awards]] and [[74th Primetime Emmy Awards]]. Is there a reason for this issue? [[User:RunningTiger123|RunningTiger123]] ([[User talk:RunningTiger123|talk]]) 02:22, 7 August 2023 (UTC)
== width? ==
Is "width" supposed to be crossed out? What does that mean? [[Special:Contributions/~2025-37491-60|~2025-37491-60]] ([[User talk:~2025-37491-60|talk]]) 15:13, 3 December 2025 (UTC)
